headline: CEO at Spotzi
summary: We empower Out-Of-Home and Retail with data-driven planning and measurement solutions. For OOH, we provide near real-time measurement and attribution tools to prove campaign effectiveness. For Retail, we help brands find the perfect store location and track performance—both their own and their competitors’.

experiences.title: CEO and Founder
experiences.description: My main focus is managing the team and establish partner relationships. I take pride in helping our customers to be successfull with the help of our GeoMarketing solution.

experiences.title: Manager
experiences.description: During my time at CLARC I managed a team of 5 Risk Consultants. In 2006 I decided to start my own Risk Consultancy company because I am an entrepreneur by heart.

experiences.title: Project Manager
experiences.description: I had a great time working at Infrastructural Projects in the Netherlands, Germany, Ivory Coast and Malaysia. I learned to be fully self supportive which makes me successful now.
